'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 106''' is the one hundred sixth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[March 6]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[My Enemies Surround Me!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[My Enemies Surround Me!]]"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Heroes of the galaxy Part 1"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 16: Reflections in a crimson eye!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The end of the universe!"
*Star Profile: [[Peter Cushing]]
